description: Safe personal Voila grocery automation for search, slots, cart updates, and order history
name: io.github.dearlordylord/voila-mcp

environmentVariables.description: Set to 1 for guest-session behavior in registry inspection or unauthenticated discovery.
environmentVariables.name: VOILA_GUEST

environmentVariables.description: Absolute path to a session JSON file captured with the Voila CLI for authenticated account workflows.
environmentVariables.name: VOILA_AUTH_SESSION_PATH

environmentVariables.description: Optional path for updated session snapshots. Defaults to VOILA_AUTH_SESSION_PATH.
environmentVariables.name: VOILA_SESSION_WRITE_PATH

title: Voila Groceries MCP
